mapper.select: SELECT PAGE_KEY, PAGE_TITLE, CONTENT_HTML, UPDDE, UPDUSR FROM SGH_PAGE_CONTENT ORDER BY PAGE_KEY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SGH_PAGE_CONTENT (PAGE_KEY, PAGE_TITLE, CONTENT_HTML, UPDUSR) VALUES (#{pageKey}, #{pageTitle}, #{contentHtml}, #{updusr}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE CONTENT_HTML = VALUES(CONTENT_HTML), UPDUSR = VALUES(UPDUSR)
